# PC-002 evidence — workspace launch profiles

Date: 2026-07-19

## Architecture delivered

- Canonical Rust/SDK workspace types persist optional `defaultThinkingEffort`; backend provider
  inventory projects model-compatible effort choices.
- Workspace session preparation carries provider, model, and effort together. ACP new-session
  materialization applies the workspace effort to the pinned `ModelConfig`, not global settings.
- The workspace editor uses provider/model/effort selects, preselects
  `chatgpt_codex` / `gpt-5.6-terra` / `medium` for new drafts, and preserves saved legacy values.
- Electron supplies `os.homedir()` as runtime-only `GOSLING_HOME_DIR`; new drafts start at
  `<home>/Work` on POSIX and Windows separators.
- The folder editor adds an explicit chooser-backed read/write Working folder flow alongside
  source/reference folders.
- The Hub exposes an accessible workspace selector and submits the selected workspace ID plus
  selected primary working folder without changing backend active state.

## Tests and checks

| Command | Result |
| --- | --- |
| Desktop `pnpm run typecheck` | pass |
| changed-file Desktop ESLint | pass: zero warnings |
| Workspace editor, Hub, and working-dir regressions | pass as part of the full Desktop suite |
| Desktop `pnpm test` | pass: 76 files / 525 tests |
| SDK `pnpm run build:ts`, `lint`, `test`, `typecheck:test` | pass: 6 tests |
| `cargo test -p gosling-sdk-types workspace` | pass: 4 tests |
| workspace capability/session targeted Rust tests | pass: 3 tests |
| `cargo test -p gosling workspace:: --lib` | pass: 23 tests |
| `cargo fmt --check` | pass |
| `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` | pass after moving the new test module behind file items |
| `git diff --check` | pass |

## Known baseline and scope limits

- Repository-wide Desktop `pnpm run lint:check` remains blocked by four pre-existing DOM-global
  errors in `scroll-area.test.tsx` and three pre-existing hook dependency warnings in
  `useNavigationSessions.ts`. Every PC-002 Desktop file passes ESLint with zero warnings.
- The approved SDK generator wrapper failed because its recipe-relative `cd crates/gosling` was
  resolved from the wrong directory under Hermit. The same approved schema generator and
  TypeScript generator were run directly from `crates/gosling` and `ui/sdk`; both succeeded.
- No GUI package, rebuild, or reinstall was performed.

## Acceptance decision

REQ-031–REQ-033 are verified. The workspace launch profile flow preserves existing sessions and
global provider state while giving each new chat an explicit, model-compatible selection.
